category_sources: source_facts.description says high performance C++ OpenPGP library; official GitHub README says RNP is a set of OpenPGP tools and librnp is the OpenPGP library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README introduces the project as RNP; source_facts.name is rnp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found for installation, platform support, tools, and library notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rnpgp/rnp; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe OpenPGP tools, C++ implementation, CLI tools, and librnp library use.
